description: Create new src/fleet/ module for Fleet and Remote Management: Fleet Manager, Policy Engine, Remote Management, Deployment Manager.
steps: Create src/fleet/ directory structure: include/fleet/ and src/

Create src/fleet/include/fleet/FleetManager.h - Endpoint registration, heartbeat monitoring, status tracking, group management, bulk operations. Structs: EndpointInfo (id, hostname, ip, os, agentVersion, lastHeartbeat, status, group, tags), EndpointGroup (id, name, endpoints), HeartbeatData (endpointId, timestamp, cpuUsage, memUsage, threatCount). Enum: EndpointStatus (Online, Offline, Degraded, Maintenance). IFleetManager interface: registerEndpoint, deregisterEndpoint, heartbeat, getEndpoints, getEndpointsByGroup, createGroup, addToGroup, bulkOperation.

Create src/fleet/src/FleetManager.cpp - Implementation with in-memory endpoint registry, heartbeat tracking with timeout detection (marks offline after configurable interval), group management, bulk operations (restart, scan, update) that queue commands.

Create src/fleet/include/fleet/PolicyEngine.h - Security policy definition and distribution. Structs: SecurityPolicy (id, name, version, rules, priority, groups, createdAt, updatedAt), PolicyRule (type, parameters, action, severity), PolicyCompliance (endpointId, policyId, compliant, violations, lastChecked). IPolicyEngine interface: createPolicy, updatePolicy, deletePolicy, distributePolicy, checkCompliance, getPolicyHistory, getInheritedPolicies.

Create src/fleet/src/PolicyEngine.cpp - Implementation: policy CRUD, version history tracking, compliance state per endpoint, policy inheritance (endpoint inherits from group, group inherits from global), distribution queue.

Create src/fleet/include/fleet/RemoteManager.h - Remote command execution interface. Structs: RemoteCommand (id, endpointId, commandType, parameters, status, result, issuedAt, completedAt), CommandResult (success, output, errorMessage, exitCode). Enum: CommandType (Scan, ConfigPush, Restart, Update, Custom). IRemoteManager interface: executeCommand, getCommandStatus, cancelCommand, pushConfig, triggerRemoteScan.
Create src/fleet/src/RemoteManager.cpp - Implementation: command queue per endpoint, status tracking, config push simulation, scan trigger dispatch.

Create src/fleet/include/fleet/DeploymentManager.h - Agent deployment tracking. Structs: DeploymentInfo (id, version, targetEndpoints, status, startedAt, completedAt, rollbackVersion), RolloutConfig (stages, batchSize, delayBetweenBatches, autoRollbackOnFailurePercent). Enum: DeploymentStatus (Planned, InProgress, Paused, Completed, RolledBack, Failed). IDeploymentManager interface: createDeployment, startRollout, pauseRollout, rollback, getDeploymentStatus, getVersionDistribution.
Create src/fleet/src/DeploymentManager.cpp - Implementation: staged rollout simulation, version tracking per endpoint, rollback capability, deployment history.
Create src/fleet/CMakeLists.txt - Static library threatone_fleet with all sources, link to threatone_compiler_options, threatone_core, nlohmann_json.
Update root CMakeLists.txt - Add add_subdirectory(src/fleet) before src/app.
Create tests/fleet/test_fleet_manager.cpp - Tests for endpoint registration, heartbeat timeout detection, group management, bulk operations.
Create tests/fleet/test_policy_engine.cpp - Tests for policy CRUD, versioning, compliance checking, inheritance.
Create tests/fleet/test_remote_manager.cpp - Tests for command execution, status tracking, cancellation.
Create tests/fleet/test_deployment_manager.cpp - Tests for deployment creation, staged rollout, rollback.
Update tests/CMakeLists.txt - Add fleet test files, include fleet headers, link threatone_fleet.
acceptance_criteria: cmake --build build compiles the new threatone_fleet library without errors
ctest passes all new fleet tests
Fleet manager correctly detects offline endpoints after heartbeat timeout
Policy engine correctly resolves inherited policies
Deployment manager correctly tracks staged rollout progress and supports rollback
